name: WordPress
short_desc: The web's most popular CMS — blogs, marketing sites, ecommerce, and 60K+ plugins.
author: WordPress.org
description: WordPress is the most widely used content-management system on the web — used by everything from personal blogs to Fortune 500 marketing sites. Run it self-hosted on Bizeros to keep full control of your content, plugin code, customer data, and SEO. The package bundles WordPress 6.9 (Apache + PHP 8.4) with a dedicated MariaDB 11 database. After install, the WordPress 5-minute setup wizard walks you through site title, admin account, and tagline.

form_fields.label: Database Password
form_fields.hint: Auto-generated password for the bundled MariaDB `wordpress` user that the WordPress app connects with.

form_fields.label: Database Root Password
form_fields.hint: Auto-generated MariaDB root password — used only for direct DB administration via `docker exec`.
